titleStmt.title: SII 19.167: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 167. (A.R. No. 17 of 1920.) TIRUMAḺAVĀḌI, UDAIYARPALAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE WEST WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, VAIDYANĀTHA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records the gift of 90 sheep and a ram for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Mahādēva at Tirumalavāḍi, by Tirukkuṉṟamuḍaiyāṉ Kāmaṉ Tāyaṉ a teacher of Iḍaiyāṟu. Preceding this inscription is a piece of 4 lines with its beginning damaged, which records a gift of 4 mā of land for the ardhayāma service in the temple by Parāntakan Mādēvaḍigaḷ the mother of Uttama-Chōḷa (A.R. No. 204 of 1925).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripanmarkku yāṇṭu 6Āvatu
Iṭaiyāṟṟu vāttit tirukkunṟamuṭaiyān kāman tāyan tirumaḻavāṭi mahādevarkku can=tirāttaval I
ravum pakalum nicati Uḻakkuppaṭi Oru non=tāviḷakkunukku cāvāmuvāp perāṭu vaiytta Āṭu 9 10 vittukkiṭāy O
nṟu Ivaney Inney yeriya vaitta nilaiviḷakku tarāvināl 1 Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .
Preceding the above are these four lines with their beginnings completely erased.

vaṭitevan nilattukku teṟkkum Ivvicaitta perunānkellaiyilum makappaṭṭa nilam Oru māvum Ākattaṭi Ira
ṇṭināl nilam nānku māvum Innilam mikutikkuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka vilaikoṇṭu kuṭutta poṉ muppatiṉ
kaḻañcu kuṭuttu Innilam nānkumāvum vilaikoṇṭu Arttayāmattukkuk koṇṭu kuṭutten pirān=takan
mātevaṭikaḷen Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.167 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
